title: Bocian - Salted Caramel Liqueur - 500ml, 16% Alk
features: INDULGENT FLAVOR EXPLOSION: Savor the divine fusion of rich caramel, premium fleur de sel sea salt, and velvety milk liqueur in every luscious sip.
LUXURIOUS TEXTURE & MOUTHFEEL: Relish the silky smooth, creamy consistency that transforms this liqueur into a decadent sensory delight for your taste buds.
VERSATILE COCKTAIL COMPANION: Elevate your cocktails, enrich your coffee or hot chocolate, and add a touch of elegance when drizzled over your favorite desserts.
SOPHISTICATED PAIRINGS GALORE: Complements a wide array of sweet and savory dishes, making it an exceptional partner for desserts, cheeses, and charcuterie boards.
MEMORABLE MOMENTS GUARANTEED: Enjoy it neat, on the rocks, or shared with friends; Bocian Salted Caramel Milk Liqueur makes every occasion a true celebration.
description: Product Description Bocian - Salted Caramel Liqueur - 500ml, 16% Alk Manufacturer Contact Information Unit 2, Kelvin Way, West Bromwich 870 7LB, UK

specifications_table.Storage Instructions: ‎Keep in cool, dry area out of direct sunlight.
